\tzpentry{ID4830}{Tunnel Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4830 introduces Tunnel Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$H_tunnel = _0 a^ a + ^22m_eff (_d)^2 + V[d] + g_tunnel (a^ + a)(_d + _d^)$$
